headline: Lumen’s Consumer Fiber Sale and AI Network Pivot Could Be A Game Changer For Lumen Technologies (LUMN)
summary: Lumen Technologies recently released its first-quarter results after the close, following the completion of its sale of the consumer fiber-to-the-home business to AT&T and progress on using the proceeds to reduce debt and sharpen its focus on enterprise fiber and AI-oriented low-latency networks. By issuing new guarantees for Level 3’s first-lien obligations and consolidating SEC reporting, Lumen is simplifying its corporate structure just as it pivots away from consumer broadband toward...
